title: Python Codegen Completion

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: The previous completion claim only proved generated adapter coverage; the user clarified that Python is not complete while hand-owned cli.py entrypoints remain and future targets must not silently rely on Python internals.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to the promoted TODO item and its stated touched paths.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Migrate the agentic-memory Python console front door away from package-local cli.py while keeping hand-owned runtime primitives in a non-CLI module and preserving generated dispatch proof.
proof_expectations: uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace scripts/check tests
completion_criteria: Complete the Python lane so executable CLI front doors and runtime operation boundaries are generated or represented by implementation-independent artifacts, with no hand-owned cli.py outside generated/python and no implicit Python-internal dependency for future targets.

execution_run.what happened: Root front-door slice was committed/pushed, then agentic-planning was migrated to `repo_planning_bootstrap.generated_cli_entrypoint` with hand-owned runtime primitives moved from `packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/cli.py` to `_runtime_cli.py`.
execution_run.scope touched: root and planning Python front-door/runtime ownership metadata; memory package front door remains for the next slice
execution_run.changed surfaces: packages/planning/pyproject.toml; packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/generated_cli_entrypoint.py; packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/_runtime_cli.py; root planning delegation imports; generated TypeScript planning runtime metadata; focused proof/tests; this execplan and state.toml
execution_run.validations run: uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py packages/planning/tests -q; uv run ruff check packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests src/agentic_workspace/_runtime_cli.py scripts/check tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py packages/command-generation/src; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run python -m repo_planning_bootstrap.generated_cli_entrypoint status --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: root and planning front-door slices are proven; continue with memory package front-door migration
execution_run.next step: Commit and push the planning front-door slice, then implement and prove the memory package front-door migration slice.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
